subject: Smart Cities

tenders.title: Czechia – Information systems – Mzdový, personální a docházkový informační systém
tenders.bid_fit_summary: The tender in Czechia for an information system related to payroll, personnel, and attendance does not align well with PARTTEAM's core product offerings, which focus on kiosks and digital signage. The opportunity does not directly involve smart city infrastructure or digital kiosks, which are PARTTEAM's strengths.
tenders.strategic_link: This opportunity does not serve PARTTEAM's strategic objectives related to smart cities or international expansion, as it does not involve digital public infrastructure or kiosk deployments.
tenders.recommended_action: PARTTEAM should not pursue this opportunity as it does not align with their strategic objectives or product offerings.

tenders.title: Germany – Electrical wiring and fitting work – Umbau und Erweiterung Medico Palais Gebäudeautomationsanlagen
tenders.bid_fit_summary: The opportunity involves electrical wiring and fitting work for building automation systems in Germany, which is not directly aligned with PARTTEAM's core products like kiosks and digital signage. However, the sector is Smart Cities, which aligns with PARTTEAM's strategic objective to expand in EU-funded smart city projects. The opportunity could be explored if there is potential for integrating digital signage or kiosk solutions into the project.
tenders.strategic_link: This opportunity serves Objective 3 — Smart Cities and Public Procurement, by potentially expanding PARTTEAM's presence in EU-funded smart city projects.
tenders.recommended_action: Monitor the opportunity for any developments that might involve digital signage or kiosk integration.

private_opportunities.title: Smart Cities Awards
private_opportunities.snippet:
For more details contact Ann Whiting / awhiting@idc.com

  Nominate now
 ### The Nomination Process

  It is free to apply, and the online application takes 15–20 minutes to complete. Anyone can nominate a project, but only the public sector organization that implemented the project is eligible to win the award.

  Deadline to complete is January 15, 2026.

  We are looking for:

  + Implemented projects (not ideas or planned initiatives) that leverage emerging technologies— such as AI, GenAI, edge computing, cloud—to solve real challenges.
  + Initiatives that improve livability, resiliency, and economic opportunity for communities while fostering accessible, user friendly experiences and services. [...] Sustainable Infrastructure (e.g. Smart Buildings, Smart Water, Smart Lighting, Waste Collection, Environmental Monitoring, Resiliency)
 ### 9.

  Transportation (e.g. Connected, Autonomous, Electric and Shared Vehicles, Public Transit, Parking, Transit Hubs, Traffic Management, Transportation Infrastructure)
 ### 10.

  Urban Planning and Land Use (e.g. Permitting, Licensing, Inspection & Zoning; Digital Twins, Community Resiliency)

## Join us for the 9th year of the IDC Smart Cities and Communities Awards program!

Nominate now

## IDC Environmental Policy [...] Nominate Now

 ### Why Participate?

  The IDC Smart Cities Awards bring together people who are passionate about their work and provide an opportunity to be recognized as well as to learn and share with peers.

  Winners and finalists receive:

  + An invitation to Smart Cities Connect in Raleigh, NC, March 10-12, 2026, for an awards ceremony and IDC reception.  Winners receive an award and a speaking opportunity during the awards ceremony.
  + One hour of IDC analyst expertise to use in 2026.  Winners also receive an IDC report of their choice.
  + A social media kit and coverage in IDC blogs and publications.
  + Current IDC clients are featured in a Winner’s Spotlight with opportunities for participation in online events and webinars.
private_opportunities.bid_fit_summary: The Smart Cities Awards nomination is a medium fit for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS as it aligns with the company's strategic objective to increase visibility and credibility in the smart cities sector. However, the opportunity is more about recognition than direct business development, and it does not directly lead to new contracts or sales.
private_opportunities.strategic_link: This opportunity serves Objective 3 — Smart Cities and Public Procurement by potentially enhancing PARTTEAM's reputation and visibility in the smart cities sector, which could indirectly support future tender wins.
private_opportunities.recommended_action: PARTTEAM should consider nominating a successful project to enhance its visibility and credibility in the smart cities sector.

private_opportunities.bid_fit_summary: The SmartLA 2028 initiative in Los Angeles presents an opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to expand its presence in the smart city sector, particularly with its digital signage and interactive display products. However, the focus on non-EU markets and the lack of direct commercial presence in the US may limit immediate impact.

private_opportunities.recommended_action: Monitor the development of the SmartLA 2028 initiative for potential partnership or collaboration opportunities.

News, Events and Technology Updates

# Press Releases Articles

Smart City Networks Wins NRG Park Bid, Bringing Wi-Fi 7 and Infrastructure Upgrades

## Smart City Networks Wins NRG Park Bid, Bringing Wi-Fi 7 and Infrastructure Upgrades

Smart City Networks, the leading provider of telecommunications and technology services for the convention and event industry, is proud to announce it has secured a new contract with NRG Park following a competitive bid process. This win reinforces a trusted partnership that has spanned more than 40 years and marks…

Read More

Building Updates, Press ReleasesNRG Park [...] Smart City Networks has renewed their service contract with the Charlotte Convention Center (CCC) extending their partnership to provide quality telecommunications and internet services. Smart City and the Charlotte Convention Center have agreed to a twelve-year extension of the existing contract. Smart City has been the exclusive internet, telecommunications, and…

Read More

Smart City Networks Partners with the Washington State Convention Center to Complete Multi-Million Dollar Renovations Project

## Smart City Networks Partners with the Washington State Convention Center to Complete Multi-Million Dollar Renovations Project [...] Smart City Networks was recognized before the U.S. Senate Commerce, Science and Transportation Committee for its efforts to assist the COVID-19 response across the country. Jonathan Spalter, President and Chief Executive Officer, USTelecom – The Broadband Association, thanked Smart City, for its work to implement telemedical technology and solutions in centers serving…

executive_takeaway: The biggest opportunity this week lies in the German tender for building automation systems, which, while not directly aligned with PARTTEAM's core offerings, could present integration opportunities for digital signage or kiosks. Leadership should prioritize monitoring this tender for developments that could align with PARTTEAM's strategic objectives in the smart cities sector. Additionally, the Smart Cities Awards present a chance to enhance visibility and credibility, which could indirectly support future tender wins. Consider nominating a successful project to leverage this opportunity.

── EXECUTIVE TAKEAWAY ───────────────────────────────
The biggest opportunity this week lies in the German tender for building automation systems, which, while not directly aligned with PARTTEAM's core offerings, could present integration opportunities for digital signage or kiosks. Leadership should prioritize monitoring this tender for developments that could align with PARTTEAM's strategic objectives in the smart cities sector. Additionally, the Smart Cities Awards present a chance to enhance visibility and credibility, which could indirectly support future tender wins. Consider nominating a successful project to leverage this opportunity.
